title: Edison International: Still Solid But I'd Like Some Debt Reduction
text: Edison International is set to benefit from increased spending on capacity and grid improvements, while the transition to renewables aid profit margins and lowers costs. But their high debt load and interest expense in a rising interest rate environment can mitigate the benefits, so I would like to see some debt reduction plan before adding.

title: Edison International (EIX) Q2 Earnings and Revenues Top Estimates
text: Edison International (EIX) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 4.44% and 16.01%, respectively, for the quarter ended June 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: What's in Store for Edison International (EIX) in Q2 Earnings?
text: Edison International's (EIX) second-quarter results are likely to reflect favorable sales performance, buoyed by favorable weather conditions. Meanwhile, wildfire-related costs might have impacted its earnings.

title: AGR or EIX: Which Is a Better Utility Power Stock to Pick?
